settings.title: SHIPPING AND DELIVERY
settings.content: Our customers' satisfaction is our highest priority. Therefore, we always keep you updated about your order and offer free shipping. Click here for our shipping conditions

settings.title: CUSTOMER SERVICE
settings.content: At UK-Chic we are always there for you. You can contact us at any time of day and count on our dedicated customer service team, which helps you with all questions and needs. Use the contact form or write an email to contact@uk-chic.com to get in touch with us.

settings.title: 30 DAY MONEY-BACK GUARANTEE
settings.content: We love our products and we are sure that you will too! Therefore, we offer a risk-free 30-day test period. If you don't love our products, you get your money back. Click here for our return conditions

settings.title: PAYMENT METHOD
settings.content: With us you can pay securely with credit card and PayPal. An SSL connection (Secure Socket Layer) protects the digital transmission of your personal data, including credit card and account information. Protection of your data is our highest priority. Therefore, we handle your data extremely confidentially, do not pass them on to third parties and only use them for specific processes before we delete them.
